Class PickingPointHub

java.lang.Object
com.amazingco.PickingPoint
com.amazingco.PickingPointHub
public class PickingPointHub extends PickingPoint
PickingPointHub for Amazingco systems. A hub of groupable pickup points (Kiosk or PackageLocker). A hub must be initialized with at least two groupable points. All grouped elements must share the same GPS location and cannot have duplicate identifiers. Groupable elements may be added or removed dynamically as long as the hub maintains the minimum of two elements. A hub is considered to have available space if any of its grouped elements has available space. A hub is eligible for cash-on-delivery if at least one grouped element is a Kiosk.

  • Constructor Details

    • PickingPointHub

      public PickingPointHub(String identifier, es.uva.inf.poo.maps.GPSCoordinate coordinates, LocalTime openingTime, GroupablePoint[] groupables)
      Constructor for PickingPointHub.
      Parameters:
      identifier - String representing the PickingPointHub identifier
      coordinates - GPSCoordinate representing the hub location
      openingTime - LocalTime representing the hub opening time
      groupables - Array of GroupablePoint forming the hub (Kiosks and PackageLockers)

  • Method Details

    • setGroupable

      public void setGroupable(GroupablePoint[] groupables)
      Sets the groupable elements for this hub, replacing any existing ones.
      Parameters:
      groupables - Array of GroupablePoint forming the hub
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if groupables is null, has fewer than 2 elements, contains duplicate identifiers, or elements have differing GPS locations

    • removeGroupable

      public void removeGroupable(GroupablePoint groupable)
      Removes a groupable element from this hub.
      Parameters:
      groupable - GroupablePoint to remove
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if groupable is null, if hub size would drop below minimum, or if the element is not part of the hub

    • addGroupable

      public void addGroupable(GroupablePoint groupable)
      Adds a groupable element to the hub.
      Parameters:
      groupable - GroupablePoint to add
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if groupable is null, has a different location, or duplicates an identifier

    • getGroupables

      public GroupablePoint[] getGroupables()
      Returns the elements belonging to this hub.
      Returns:
      Array of GroupablePoint elements in the hub

    • isSpaceAvailable

      public Boolean isSpaceAvailable()
      Returns whether any grouped element has available space.
      Specified by:
      isSpaceAvailable in class PickingPoint
      Returns:
      Boolean indicating if space is available in any groupable

    • getGroupableCount

      public Integer getGroupableCount()
      Returns the number of elements in the hub.
      Returns:
      Integer count of non-null groupable elements

    • isEligibleForCashOnDelivery

      public Boolean isEligibleForCashOnDelivery()
      Returns whether any grouped element is eligible for cash-on-delivery for a given package.
      Returns:
      Boolean indicating if any groupable is a Kiosk (eligible for COD)

    • setOperative

      public void setOperative(Boolean operative)
      Sets the operative flag for the hub and propagates to grouped elements.
      Overrides:
      setOperative in class PickingPoint
      Parameters:
      operative - Boolean indicating operative status
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if operative is null
